# LIF Media

> Audio-Visual content production company based in Moncton, New Brunswick — serving Atlantic Canada and beyond with cinematic commercials, brand documentaries, event highlight films, and social media content.

LIF Media produces cinema-grade video content for brands, government, sports, non-profits, founders, and national broadcasters across New Brunswick (Moncton, Saint John, Fredericton, Dieppe, Riverview, Bathurst) and the rest of Atlantic Canada. Notable clients and collaborations include the United Nations, TSN, CTV News, the Moncton Wildcats, Real Atlantic Superstore, the Pond-Deshpande Centre at the University of New Brunswick, Premium MG, Innova Design Studio, and Soccer NB.

Founded by Jorge Melgar (Creative Director). Multilingual production capability — English, French, and Spanish. Available for same-day, broadcast-spec, and bilingual deliverables.

Contact: contact@lifmedia.ca | +1 (506) 688-7043 | 21 Rue Foxtrot, Moncton, NB, Canada, E1C 1E6

## Services

- [Cinematic Commercials](https://www.lifmedia.ca/cinematic-commercials/): Cinema-grade brand commercials for businesses across New Brunswick and Atlantic Canada.
- [Brand Documentaries & Interviews](https://www.lifmedia.ca/documentaries-interviews/): Long-form brand storytelling, founder interviews, and documentary production.
- [Event Highlight Films](https://www.lifmedia.ca/events/): Conference, forum, summit, and corporate event highlight videos — including same-day delivery and French-language productions.
- [Social Media Content](https://www.lifmedia.ca/social-media/): Short-form content for YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, TikTok, and Facebook. Founder personal-brand content production on monthly retainer.

## Industries served

- [Construction](https://www.lifmedia.ca/industries/construction/) — including fireproofing, firestopping, caulking, drywall, and general contracting.
- [Industrial](https://www.lifmedia.ca/industries/industrial/)
- [Marketing Agencies](https://www.lifmedia.ca/industries/marketing-agencies/) (white-label production for agencies in Ontario, Quebec, and Atlantic Canada)
- [Real Estate](https://www.lifmedia.ca/industries/real-estate/) — including property walkthrough videos and developer marketing
- [Restaurants & Hospitality](https://www.lifmedia.ca/industries/restaurants-hospitality/)
- [Healthcare & Dental](https://www.lifmedia.ca/industries/healthcare-dental/)
- [Non-Profit](https://www.lifmedia.ca/industries/non-profit/) and social enterprise
- [Government & Political](https://www.lifmedia.ca/industries/government-political/) — including municipal campaigns and government summits

## Production case studies (blog)

- [Filming for TSN in Fredericton, NB](https://www.lifmedia.ca/blog/tsn-broadcast-feature-fredericton-amputee-curling/): National broadcast feature for TSN — historic curling story. Why national broadcasters book New Brunswick-based crews.
- [Personal Brand Video for Founders — Innova Design Studio Case Study](https://www.lifmedia.ca/blog/personal-brand-video-founders-moncton-innova-design-studio/): The short-form + long-form content pipeline for founders. Case study with Alexander Corasaniti of Innova Design Studio in Moncton, NB.
- [Documenting Social Enterprise in Saint John, NB](https://www.lifmedia.ca/blog/social-enterprise-video-saint-john-pond-deshpande/): Highlight film for the Pond-Deshpande Centre at the University of New Brunswick.
- [Same-Day French-Language Event Highlight Video in Moncton — CAPBLEU 2025](https://www.lifmedia.ca/blog/event-highlight-video-moncton-capbleu-blueshift-2025/): Same-day French event video for the Canada-Africa Forum on the Port Industry and the Blue Economy, held at Hotel Delta Beauséjour in Moncton.
- [Why Construction Companies Need a Hero Video — Premium MG Case Study](https://www.lifmedia.ca/blog/hero-video-construction-website-premium-mg/): Hero video production for Premium MG, a fireproofing, firestopping, caulking, and drywall contractor operating across Atlantic Canada and Ontario.
- [Acadian Heritage on Ice — Moncton Wildcats x Jack Livingstone Jersey](https://www.lifmedia.ca/blog/moncton-wildcats-jersey-jack-livingstone/): Community jersey storytelling for the Wildcats, Real Atlantic Superstore, and PC Children's Charity.
- [One-Day Municipal Campaign Video Production in Moncton](https://www.lifmedia.ca/blog/campaign-video-production-moncton-julianna-mutch/): Pre-production playbook for a single-day political/municipal campaign shoot.
- [Filming the UN's "More Than a Game" with Soccer NB](https://www.lifmedia.ca/blog/un-more-than-a-game-soccer-nb-moncton/): Documenting Soccer NB and Heritier Masimengo in Moncton for the United Nations' World Cup campaign.

## Coverage area

Primary: Moncton, Dieppe, Riverview, Saint John, Fredericton, Bathurst, and the rest of New Brunswick.
Atlantic Canada: Halifax, Charlottetown, St. John's (NL), and PEI.
Available for national broadcast crew bookings from Ontario, Quebec, and US-based producers needing a Maritimes-based crew.

## Key capabilities

- Broadcast-spec gear locally owned (Sony FX-series cinema bodies, DJI drones, Sigma and Tamron lenses, professional audio)
- Same-day delivery pipeline for events, news features, and conferences
- French-language production for events in officially bilingual New Brunswick
- White-label production for agencies based outside Atlantic Canada
- Monthly personal-brand content retainers for founders and CEOs
